---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Openfy
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. For example:
> "As an Apify creator, I have no way to estimate actor revenue before publishing, so I can't decide whether to invest time building a particular actor."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see added. Be as specific as possible:
- What command, file, or UI change would implement this?
- What would the output look like?
- What configuration would users need to provide?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried or considered. Why are they insufficient?

## Use Case

Who benefits from this feature and how often would they use it?

| Field | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Target user | e.g. Apify creators migrating from vanilla SDK |
| Frequency of use | e.g. Once per new actor |
| Workflow step | e.g. Before running `npm run sync-store` |

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)

If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented technically, share them here. No requirement — just helpful context for maintainers.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links to related issues, or references to similar features in other tools.
